creator: erik@cederstrand.dk
text:
Similar to bin/172289. lpr doesn't check the return value of seteuid(). This can lead to privilege escalation.

Fix: lpr uses seteuid() to switch between root and user privileges. Use example from at(1) and redefine seteuid() calls as macros PRIV_START and PRIV_END, and add a check on the return value in the macro. Place this macro in common_source/lp.h

Including err.h causes two name clashes: a variable named "err" and a function named "warn". Rename these.


Patch attached with submission follows:
